title: 24PCS Christmas Mochi Squishy Toys - Mini Stocking Stuffers Kawaii Fidget Party Toy Pack with 24 Stickers Drawstring Bags - Soft Squeezable Relieve Stress Party Bag Fillers for Girls Boys
features: 【24 Christmas Mochi Toys】Each Mochi is bright in color, soft and comfortable, and has individual packaging. Each one is different, there will be no repeated shapes, which can cultivate children's color and shape cognition

【Christmas Party Bag Fillers】Each pack contains 24 unique Christmas stickers, a Christmas bag and 24 squishy toys. These stickers make a great gift for teens and girls. Christmas bag is handy for wrapping various presents and also double as a decoration for party or Christmas tree

【Upgrade Quality】Mochi is made of eco-friendly TPR silicone, soft and non-toxic. Mochi Squishy Toys has good ductility and resilience, can be pulled at will, and will quickly return to its original shape as long as the hand is released

【Easy to Clean】Mochi is reusable. When it gets dirty, you just rinse it off with water and sprinkle some talcum powder on the animal mochi (to prevent it from getting too sticky) and the mochi is like new

【Ideal Gifts】Mochi toys are the perfect choice for Christmas gifts and companionship to children. Mochi can be a birthday gift, a party favor, or even a reward. Mochi is equally suitable for stressed adults
